name: Custom Journey CTA
description: A prominent call-to-action banner on a soft yellow background. Designed to encourage users to start a custom trip inquiry, featuring a heading, description, and primary button.

test_data.heading: Don't see it? Build it.
test_data.body: Tell us your dates, your crew, and your cravings. We'll design a private itinerary from scratch — usually within 48 hours.
